quick_skim.title: Self-supervised Dynamic Heterogeneous Degradation Modeling for Unified Zero-Shot Image Restoration
quick_skim.abstract: Zero-shot image restoration provides a flexible way to handle diverse degradations without task-specific training. However, existing methods typically rely on stacked layers or pre-trained features to enhance degradation expression, while overlooking physically consistent priors. The insufficient degradation prompts impose the heavy training burden and high sampling costs during zero-shot diffusion. Moreover, the fixed inference trajectory often collapses to suboptimal solutions under complex corruptions. We observe that heterogeneous degradations can be reparameterized into a minimal set of physically coherent parameters for compact representation. Based on this insight, we first propose a unified physical zero-shot image restoration (UP-ZeroIR) framework that explicitly models heterogeneous degradations into a homogeneous all-in-one distribution. The distribution can be optimized directly in the latent space, enabling principled solution exploration and effective prompt adaptation. Besides, we introduce a dynamic quality-refinement strategy that adaptively adjusts the diffusion trajectory for robust globally optimal convergence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across both single and mixed degradations. Our code is available at https://github.com/yangjinglyy/UP-ZeroIR
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: unified zero-shot image restoration framework handling diverse degradations, applicable to hyperspectral denoising
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 统一零样本图像恢复框架，处理多种退化，适用于高光谱去噪
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 统一零样本图像恢复框架，处理多种退化，适用于高光谱去噪
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 统一零样本图像恢复框架，处理多种退化，适用于高光谱去噪
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a unified physical zero-shot image restoration method that reparameterizes heterogeneous degradations into physically coherent parameters, enabling flexible zero-shot diffusion for any corruption including denoising.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对零样本图像恢复中退化表达不充分、采样成本高的问题，提出将异构退化重参数化为物理一致的最小参数集，实现统一的物理零样本图像恢复框架。该方法无需任务特定训练，可处理包括噪声在内的多种退化，具备迁移至高光谱图像去噪的潜力。实验证明其在多种退化下表现优异。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对零样本图像恢复中退化表达不充分、采样成本高的问题，提出将异构退化重参数化为物理一致的最小参数集，实现统一的物理零样本图像恢复框架。该方法无需任务特定训练，可处理包括噪声在内的多种退化，具备迁移至高光谱图像去噪的潜力。实验证明其在多种退化下表现优异。

quick_skim.title: Geometry-Correct Diffusion Posterior Sampling with Denoiser-Pullback Curvature Guidance and Manifold-Aligned Damping
quick_skim.abstract: Diffusion posterior sampling conditions diffusion priors on measurements, but data-consistency updates are typically scaled by hand-tuned guidance weights and can destabilize sampling under stiff, operator-dependent curvature. We replace scalar guidance with a per-noise-level damped Gauss--Newton correction computed in diffusion-state coordinates. The correction pulls likelihood gradients back through the denoiser, uses a one-sided curvature model that avoids forward denoiser Jacobians, and applies diffusion-calibrated rank-one damping aligned with the denoiser residual. Each correction is solved with matrix-free GMRES using automatic differentiation, and sampling proceeds with a variance-preserving Langevin transition with a closed-form drift/noise split. On FFHQ and ImageNet across inverse problems, it achieves competitive PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS while running markedly faster than most of the compared baselines; on accelerated MRI reconstruction, it achieves the best PSNR/SSIM among the compared baselines.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: denoising method via diffusion posterior sampling with denoiser guidance
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过扩散后验采样和去噪器引导的去噪方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过扩散后验采样和去噪器引导的去噪方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过扩散后验采样和去噪器引导的去噪方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes geometry-correct diffusion posterior sampling with damped Gauss-Newton correction using the denoiser, improving stability and data consistency for inverse problems including denoising.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对扩散后验采样中数据一致性更新不稳定问题，提出几何校正方法。采用每噪声级别的阻尼高斯-牛顿校正，通过去噪器拉回似然梯度，避免显式计算雅可比矩阵。该方法适用于多种逆问题（包括去噪），为高光谱图像去噪提供了先进的概率框架。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对扩散后验采样中数据一致性更新不稳定问题，提出几何校正方法。采用每噪声级别的阻尼高斯-牛顿校正，通过去噪器拉回似然梯度，避免显式计算雅可比矩阵。该方法适用于多种逆问题（包括去噪），为高光谱图像去噪提供了先进的概率框架。
